original_image_tags: A document with a horizontal stamp near the bottom center and a date stamp to the right.

elements.description: A vertical stamp along the left margin containing the text 'For Secret Routing'. A date stamp at the bottom right reading 'RECORDED - 135 12 MAY 13 1949'.

judge.reason: Description A mentions a 'horizontal stamp near the bottom center' while Description B describes a 'vertical stamp along the left margin' with specific text, indicating a clear contradiction in the location, orientation, and content of the stamp.
